title: Yaa Samar! Dance Theatre – Gathering
description: Major performing-arts presenter at UC Berkeley that brings international dance, music, and theater to campus venues like Zellerbach Hall.

title: Object Oriented: Abstraction and Design in the BAMPFA Collection
description: UC Berkeley Art Museum and Pacific Film Archive exhibition exploring modern and contemporary art and design.

title: Open: Art Lab in BAMPFA
description: Hands-on creative studio sessions run by the Berkeley Art Museum for students and visitors.

title: Art Wall: Stephanie Syjuco – Present Tense
description: Contemporary installation program organized by Berkeley Art Museum featuring socially engaged artists.

title: Sensitive Witnessing and the Material Sublime, Then and Now
description: Interdisciplinary academic research group hosting lectures on literature, history, and visual culture.

title: SURF, Rose Hills, and Haas Scholars Application Workshop
description: Campus office that supports undergraduate research funding, mentorship, and competitive scholarship programs.

title: Regional Parks Botanic Garden Guided Tour
description: Research and education unit focused on plant biodiversity, conservation, and public tours.

title: How Shakespeare Saved My Life
description: Campus performing-arts presenter hosting theater, music, and lecture events.

title: Berkeley Playhouse: Once
description: Local theater partner that stages musical and dramatic productions frequently listed on the campus calendar.
